findings.blocker: Mathlib lacks lemmas for restricting IsLocalization from larger to smaller submonoid. All standard lemmas go opposite direction (extending to larger submonoid).

attempts.strategy: Use IsLocalization.iff_of_le_of_exists_dvd to show two submonoids give same localization
attempts.lean_error: Requires proving every element of q.primeCompl divides something in algebraMapSubmonoid S p.primeCompl - too strong and unclear
attempts.insight: Standard Mathlib lemmas for relating localizations require divisibility conditions that are too strong

attempts.lean_error: Lemma goes wrong direction - requires IsLocalization for smaller submonoid to prove it for larger
attempts.insight: All standard Mathlib lemmas extend localization to larger submonoid, not restrict to smaller

attempts.strategy: Direct proof via isLocalization_iff - prove three conditions: units, surjectivity, injectivity
attempts.code_tried: Proved condition 1 (units map to units). Partial progress on condition 2 (surjectivity) - handled case where denominator is in image of p.primeCompl
attempts.lean_error: Remaining case: when s ∈ q.primeCompl is NOT in image of p.primeCompl, need to use uniqueness hypothesis to find alternative representation
attempts.insight: Need to use uniqueness hypothesis to show elements of q.primeCompl not in image can still be expressed via smaller submonoid. Requires 50-100+ lines of infrastructure.

next_steps: Requires substantial infrastructure work to properly use uniqueness hypothesis. Consider: (1) accepting as sorry, (2) consulting Stacks 00EA for precise technique, or (3) proving auxiliary lemmas about submonoid relationships under uniqueness.

findings.blocker: None - proof structure is clear, just needs implementation

attempts.strategy: Follow blueprint thm:ff-identifies-local-rings-plus-c-has-retraction-if - prove closed points map is surjective, use projectivity to get section, construct Restriction, apply bijective_of_bijective
attempts.code_tried: Proved step 1: closed points map is surjective using PrimeSpectrum.specComap_surjective_of_faithfullyFlat
attempts.goal_before: Prove exists retraction S → R given faithfully flat R → S with bijective stalks and extremally disconnected π₀(Spec R)
attempts.goal_after: Remaining: apply CompactT2.Projective to get section σ, define T = Set.range σ, instantiate Restriction T, show S_T is w-local, show R → S_T satisfies bijective_of_bijective hypotheses, extract retraction
attempts.insight: Blueprint proof outline is clear and all key infrastructure exists in Mathlib and WLocal.lean (which has 0 sorries). Main work is setting up topological and algebraic properties correctly.

next_steps: Continue implementation: (1) Apply CompactT2.Projective to get section, (2) Define T and show closed, (3) Instantiate Restriction T, (4) Prove S_T is w-local, (5) Verify bijective_of_bijective hypotheses, (6) Extract retraction. Estimated 50-100 lines remaining.

findings.blocker: Fundamental categorical infrastructure gap. Properties (EffectiveEpi ↔ Surjective) hold for specific morphism properties like Etale but not for arbitrary P. Comments acknowledge these are 'non-trivial in general'.

attempts.lean_error: Cannot synthesize EffectiveEpi (F.map g) or UniversallyOpen (F.map g).left for general P
attempts.insight: Approach requires P to imply UniversallyOpen, which is not assumed

attempts.strategy: Create specialized Preregular (AffineEtale S) instance bypassing general sorries
attempts.lean_error: Functor AffineEtale.Spec S does not automatically preserve pullbacks in way that makes pullbackComparison an isomorphism
attempts.insight: Nested structure (CostructuredArrow → Over → Scheme) makes it difficult to transfer surjectivity properties

attempts.strategy: Show IsIso (pullbackComparison (AffineEtale.Spec S) f g) to transfer surjectivity
attempts.lean_error: Cannot synthesize IsIso - functor preserves pullbacks but comparison not automatically isomorphism
attempts.insight: Would require 50-100+ lines of categorical infrastructure about costructured arrow categories

next_steps: Accept as fundamental infrastructure gap. File compiles and instances work despite sorries. If upstream wants these filled, should be addressed as Mathlib contribution about costructured arrow categories and morphism properties.

findings.blocker: Mathematical impossibility with current statement. Surjectivity alone insufficient - preimages of compact opens under surjective maps are not necessarily compact without additional assumptions (proper maps, compact spaces, or spectral structure).

attempts.strategy: Add continuity assumption to make preimages of opens be open
attempts.code_tried: hgc : ∀ i k, Continuous (g i k)
attempts.lean_error: Even with continuity, preimages of compacts are not necessarily compact
attempts.insight: Need additional assumptions: IsProperMap (g i k), or CompactSpace (Y i k), or spectral/prespectral structure

next_steps: Statement needs revision. Options: (1) Add proper map assumption, (2) Add compact space assumption, (3) Weaken conclusion to only require images cover U, or (4) Accept as sorry with documentation. Original comment correctly identified this issue.
